message:
fix(policy): repair decision log tests and add coverage for DSL custom rules

- Fix export_json test: to_string_pretty produces multi-line JSON, not compact
- Fix PolicyRule construction bug: `enabled` field doesn't exist, use `description`
- Add decision_log_from_safety_config_wires_decision_log_settings test
- Add decision_log_records_dsl_custom_rule_match test (custom PolicyRule deny)
- Add decision_log_snapshot_serializable test (serde roundtrip)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
